response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:48: 'Sweet Memories' performance identified. Searched for 'Sweet Memories 歌詞' and found the original lyrics by Seiko Matsuda (often covered). 2. 00:49-03:47: Talk segment. 3. 04:03-05:00: Performance of 'Cobra'. On-screen text identified 'Music: Ohno Yuji' and 'Lyrics: Fuyumori Kayoko'. Searched for 'コブラ 前野曜子 歌詞'. Found lyrics for the original anime theme song.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by VTubers from the 'ERBday2026' event, interspersed with a talk segment where they discuss their performance and answer questions. The first song is a cover of 'Sweet Memories', and the second is a cover of the theme song 'Cobra' from the anime series of the same name.

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Sweet Memories'. The characters perform a choreographed dance while singing.
scenes.performer_in_video: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Nerissa Ravencroft, and others
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
懐かしい痛みだわ
ずっと前に忘れていた
でもあなたを見たとき
時間だけ後戻りしたの
「幸福?」と聞かないで
嘘つくのは上手じゃない
友だちならいるけど
あんなには燃えあがれなくて
失った夢だけが
美しく見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った優しさも今は
甘い記憶
SWEET MEMORIES
Don't kiss me baby we can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
あの頃は若すぎて
悪戯に傷つけあった二人
色褪せた哀しみも今は
遠い記憶
SWEET MEMORIES
失った夢だけが
美しく見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った優しさも今は
甘い記憶
SWEET MEMORIES
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's a nostalgic pain
I had forgotten it long ago
But when I saw you
Only the time went back
Don't ask me 'Are you happy?'
I'm not good at telling lies
I have friends
But I couldn't burn for them like that
Why is it that only the lost dreams
Look beautiful?
Even the kindness that passed by is now
A sweet memory
Sweet memories
Don't kiss me baby we can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
Those days were too young
We hurt each other playfully
Even the faded sadness is now
A distant memory
Sweet memories
Why is it that only the lost dreams
Look beautiful?
Even the kindness that passed by is now
A sweet memory
Sweet memories
